titleStmt.title: SII 26.182: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 182. (A.R. No. 171 of 1909.) AVANĀSHI, AVANASHI TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is incomplete. It records the undertaking given by a certain [••••] Aviṅāśi alias Śīkāḻiyān of Kāśyapa-gōtra, a Śivabrāhmaṇa having a right in the temple, to burn 32 sandhyādīpas in the temple with the oil endowed during his grandfather's time as well as oil and other things endowed now. Also records the undertaking given probably by the same person to feed ascetics during the midday worship in the temple. With the help of the amount of ten kaḻañju of gold endowed by Āṟṟūruḍaiyāṉ Tiruppuṟampiyamuḍaiyāṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
kovirācakecaripaṟmarāṉa tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvirarācentiratevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉaiñcāvatu Ikkoyiliṟ kāṇiyuṭaiya śivabrāhmaṇan kāśipakottirattu riyāna Avi
nāciyāna cikāḻiyānen [e?]n pāṭṭanmār munpu koṇṭa Eṇṇai Upaiyattinālum Eṇṇai Upaiyattinālum palavakaiyālum nān Erikka kaṭava canti
yā tipam muppattiraṇṭum Eṟāḷapurattu viyāpāri Āṟṟūruṭaiyān ttiruppuṟampiya muṭaiyān te vaitta paṭṭaippoti coṟṟukkup pon tuḷai patin kaḻaiñcukku nā
ḷoṉṟukkup parakecariyāl Arici Aiyyuḻakkum kaṟiyamutoṉṟum tayiramutu Uḻakkum mattiyaccantiyile paratecikaḷukku Ippaṭṭaippoti coṟukuṭuppatāka Ippon nuṅkaikko
Digital edition of SII 26.182 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
